title: fix(deps): update module github.com/crc-org/vfkit to v0.6.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/crc-org/vfkit](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit) | `v0.6.0` -> `v0.6.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.0/v0.6.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcrc-org%2fvfkit/v0.6.0/v0.6.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>crc-org/vfkit (github.com/crc-org/vfkit)</summary>

### [`v0.6.1`](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/releases/tag/v0.6.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.6.0...v0.6.1)

vfkit is now available in the main brew repository, the `cfergeau` tap is no longer needed.
This release of vfkit requires go 1.23

#### What's Changed

-   add virtio-balloon device by [@​iwinux](https://redirect.github.com/iwinux) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/255](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/255)
-   allow to pass user/meta data files for cloud-init config by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/263](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/263)
-   Remove socket files created by vfkit at exit by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/230](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/230) and [@​evidolob](https://redirect.github.com/evidolob) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/283](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/283)
-   Update readme and quickstart to include vfkit in homebrew by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/260](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/260)
-   Refactor StorageConfig so it does not have both imagePath and Uri properties by [@​lstocchi](https://redirect.github.com/lstocchi) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/227](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/227)
-   test: Wait for ignition socket before requesting ignition by [@​booxter](https://redirect.github.com/booxter) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/276](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/276)

##### Dependency updates

-   build(deps): bump github.com/Code-Hex/vz/v3 from 3.5.1 to 3.6.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/238](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/238)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.29.0 to 0.36.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/234](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/234),  [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/240](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/240), [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/264](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/264) and [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/272](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/272)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.29.0 to 0.30.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/251](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/251)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/mod from 0.22.0 to 0.24.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/250](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/250) and [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/273](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/273)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/golangci/golangci-lint from 1.62.2 to 1.64.7 in /tools by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/237](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/237), [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/258](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/258), [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/266](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/266) and [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/281](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/281)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/pflag from 1.0.5 to 1.0.6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/247](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/247)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.8.1 to 1.9.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/261](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/261)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/crc-org/crc/v2 from 2.44.0 to 2.48.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/254](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/254) and [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/269](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/269)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/containers/common from 0.60.4 to 0.62.2 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/249](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/249), [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/268](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/268) and [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/282](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/282)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/260](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/260)
-   [@​iwinux](https://redirect.github.com/iwinux) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/255](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/255)
-   [@​booxter](https://redirect.github.com/booxter) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/276](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/276)
-   [@​evidolob](https://redirect.github.com/evidolob) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/283](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/vfkit/pull/283)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/crc-org/vfkit/compare/v0.6.0...v0.6.1

</details>
